allow: Bash(curl -s -L -A "Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36" -o /tmp/rose-direct.jpg -w "size=%{size_download} http=%{http_code}" "https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/e/e6/Rosa_rubiginosa_1.jpg/330px-Rosa_rubiginosa_1.jpg")

Bash(curl -s -L --max-time 15 -A "Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/124.0.0.0 Safari/537.36" --referer "https://en.wikipedia.org/" -H "Accept: image/avif,image/webp,image/apng,image/*" -o /tmp/jasmine-test.jpg -w "http=%{http_code} size=%{size_download}" "https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/4/42/Common_Jasmine.jpg/330px-Common_Jasmine.jpg?utm_source=en.wikipedia.org&utm_campaign=api&utm_content=thumbnail")

Bash(curl -s -L --max-time 20 -A 'Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/124.0.0.0 Safari/537.36' --referer https://en.wikipedia.org/ -H 'Accept: image/avif,image/webp,image/apng,image/*,*/*;q=0.8' -o /tmp/jasmine-script-test.jpg 'https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/4/42/Common_Jasmine.jpg/330px-Common_Jasmine.jpg?utm_source=en.wikipedia.org&utm_campaign=api&utm_content=thumbnail')
